mechanism_narrative: Rising policy rates increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating unemployment signals labor market deterioration, triggering recession fears and negative equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Forward returns do not significantly drop below the median when the unemployment acceleration threshold is breached.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising mortgage debt service and falling housing starts indicates demand exhaustion, compressing forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when the debt-service-to-housing-starts divergence widens beyond historical norms.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above trend sustains corporate earnings momentum, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns fail to materialize when INDPRO exceeds its 12-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: Sticky inflation with accommodative policy forces future rate hikes, causing immediate equity repricing and negative short-term returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite sticky inflation and low rates, showing no negative reaction to the trigger condition.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth directly scales corporate revenue expectations, producing positive forward equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDP growth shows no predictive power for 60-day forward returns, with Rank IC consistently below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with stable unemployment confirms labor market resilience, supporting equity valuations.
failure_condition: Payroll gains fail to lift equity returns when unemployment remains flat, indicating the interaction is spurious.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts collapsing alongside high mortgage debt service triggers a demand shock, depressing short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive despite collapsing housing starts and high debt service, refuting the demand shock mechanism.
